Issue: The document does not define all terms and units of measure as required by IEEE guidelines.
Suggestion: Include a glossary section that defines all terms and units of measure used in the document.

Suggestion: tables
column7: and diagrams are fully labeled and referenced in the related documents section.

Issue: The functional requirements do not specify responses to all realizable input data in all conceivable situations.
Suggestion: Add detailed descriptions of system responses to all possible input data
column4: including edge cases and invalid inputs.

Issue: The input interfaces table lacks detailed descriptions of the data formats and protocols used.
Suggestion: Provide detailed descriptions of the data formats and protocols for each input interface.

Issue: The output interfaces table lacks detailed descriptions of the data formats and protocols used.
Suggestion: Provide detailed descriptions of the data formats and protocols for each output interface.

Issue: The internal interface requirements are left to the design without any initial guidelines.
Suggestion: Provide initial guidelines or constraints for internal interface design to ensure consistency and compatibility.

Issue: The internal data requirements are left to the design without any initial guidelines.
Suggestion: Provide initial guidelines or constraints for internal data requirements to ensure data integrity and consistency.

Issue: The document states there are no security requirements but does not address potential security risks.
Suggestion: Conduct a security risk assessment and include relevant security requirements to mitigate identified risks.

Issue: The computer resource requirements do not specify performance metrics such as response time and throughput.
Suggestion: Include performance metrics such as response time and throughput in the computer resource requirements.

Issue: The logistics-related requirements do not specify the frequency and scope of system maintenance and software support.
Suggestion: Define the frequency and scope of system maintenance and software support in the logistics-related requirements.

Issue: The delivery requirements do not specify the format and method of delivering the software and data.
Suggestion: Specify the format and method of delivering the software and data in the delivery requirements.

Issue: The document states that the APAF data system is not required to operate in more than one state or mode without justification.
Suggestion: Provide justification for why the APAF data system is not required to operate in more than one state or mode.

Issue: The document states there are no installation-dependent requirements without considering potential future needs.
Suggestion: Consider potential future installation-dependent requirements and document them if applicable.

Issue: The document states there are no safety requirements without conducting a safety assessment.
Suggestion: Conduct a safety assessment and include relevant safety requirements if any hazards are identified.

Issue: The document states there are no software quality requirements but mentions considering software quality factors.
Suggestion: Define specific software quality requirements based on the mentioned software quality factors.

Issue: The document states there are no design and implementation constraints without considering potential constraints.
Suggestion: Consider potential design and implementation constraints and document them if applicable.

Issue: The document states there are no personnel-related requirements without considering user training and support needs.
Suggestion: Consider user training and support needs and document relevant personnel-related requirements.

Issue: The document states there are no training-related requirements without considering the complexity of the system.
Suggestion: Consider the complexity of the system and document relevant training-related requirements for users and operators.

Issue: The document states there are no precedence and criticality requirements without considering the impact of requirement prioritization.
Suggestion: Consider the impact of requirement prioritization and document relevant precedence and criticality requirements.

Issue: The baseline science requirements do not specify the data formats and validation criteria for the measurements.
Suggestion: Specify the data formats and validation criteria for each measurement in the baseline science requirements.

Issue: The launch requirements do not specify the timeline and dependencies for software delivery.

Issue: The ground system requirements do not specify the data packetization and storage strategies.

Issue: The science data management requirements do not specify the validation and calibration procedures for the scientific data.

Issue: The analysis software requirements do not specify the integration process with the NASA approved data repository.

Issue: The data management plan requirements do not specify the roles and responsibilities for data handling.
